patient_input: I've had a runny nose and mild cough for about two days. No fever. Should I be worried?
I woke up with a sore throat this morning. It's a little painful when I swallow but nothing too bad.
My nose has been stuffy for three days and I feel kind of tired. Is this just a cold?
I've been sneezing a lot and have watery eyes. I think it might be allergies but I'm not sure.
I have a low-grade fever of about 99.5 and feel achy all over. I've been resting at home.
My cough started yesterday. It's dry and a little annoying but I don't feel that sick overall.
I tested positive for COVID yesterday. My symptoms are mild — just tired and a bit congested. What should I do?
I've had a headache and body aches since this morning along with a slight cough. My temperature is 100.1.
I lost my sense of smell two days ago. No other major symptoms except a mild runny nose.
My throat is scratchy and I've been feeling run down. I've been drinking lots of fluids and resting.
I have a fever of 101 and feel chilly even though it's warm. My muscles are sore. Is this the flu?
I've been coughing for about a week now. It's mostly dry but gets worse at night. No fever.
I feel really fatigued and have no appetite. I have a low fever and a cough but nothing severe.
My 6-year-old has a runny nose and a mild fever of 100.5. She seems okay but I want to make sure I'm doing the right things.
I had a fever for two days that broke this morning. I still have a lingering cough and feel weak. When can I go back to work?
I have a stuffy nose, mild sore throat, and I've been sneezing. Started yesterday. I'm 67 years old.
I've been coughing up a little bit of clear mucus. No fever, no chest pain. Just feels like a chest cold.
I tested positive for flu yesterday. I have a fever and body aches. What treatment options do I have?
I have diabetes and I started getting a cough and runny nose today. Should I be more careful given my condition?
My symptoms got a little better yesterday but today my cough is back and I feel feverish again. Is that normal?
I'm 70 years old and I have a mild cough and slight fever. I take medication for heart disease. What should I do?
I've been feeling under the weather for about four days. Mostly congestion, mild cough, and some tiredness.
I have a sore throat that started two days ago. No fever. I'm just wondering if I should see a doctor.
My toddler has been coughing and has a low fever since last night. She's eating okay but seems tired.
I've had body aches and chills for two days. My temperature is around 100.8. I think I have the flu.
I'm pregnant and I just started having a runny nose and mild cough. I want to make sure everything is okay.
I've had a dry cough for about 10 days now. No fever or other symptoms. Should I be concerned?
I feel exhausted and have a headache. No cough, no fever. Could this be the start of something?
I tested negative for COVID but I still have a runny nose and sore throat. How long should I stay home?
My symptoms have mostly improved but I still have a slight cough. Is it safe to be around other people again?
I have chest pain that keeps coming back and it's hard to breathe. It started about 20 minutes ago.
I'm having difficulty breathing and feel like I can't get enough air. My lips look a little blue.
My child is breathing very fast and their lips are turning blue. What do I do?
I've been coughing up blood for the past hour. Is this serious?
I suddenly feel very confused and I can't breathe properly. My chest feels like it has pressure on it.
I passed out earlier and now I feel extremely short of breath. Should I call someone?
I have severe shortness of breath and I feel like I might faint. My hands are shaking.
My elderly mother is confused and disoriented and she can't seem to breathe right. She has a fever too.
I feel like someone is sitting on my chest and I can't seem to get a full breath no matter how hard I try.
Every time I try to take a deep breath it hurts really bad inside my chest. It started about an hour ago.
I keep coughing and there's a pinkish red color in what I'm spitting up. Is that normal with a chest cold?
My breathing feels really labored and heavy right now, like every breath is a struggle. I've never felt this way before.
I feel extremely lightheaded and my thoughts are really foggy. I can barely hold a conversation. I also have a bad cough.
My son went completely limp and unresponsive for about a minute while coughing. He came around but looks very pale.
I can't stop panting. I'm breathing really fast and I can't slow it down even when I try to calm myself.
There's a tightness in the middle of my chest that won't go away and I feel winded just sitting still.
My baby's skin has a grayish color around the mouth and she's making a grunting sound with each breath.
I feel like I'm going to pass out. My head is spinning and I can barely catch my breath. I've had the flu for three days.
I woke up in the middle of the night gasping. I couldn't speak for a moment. I feel okay now but I'm scared.
My chest hurts when I inhale and I've been coughing up something that looks a bit bloody. I'm really scared.
